name: Mirae Asset Nifty Financial Services ETF

index.name: Nifty Financial Services Index
index.description: Nifty Financial Services (BFSI) tracks 20 companies spanning entire financial ecosystem: banks (HDFC 28.5%, ICICI 20.3%, Kotak 9.2%), NBFCs (Bajaj Finance 5.9%), life insurance (SBI Life 6.8%, HDFC Life 6.5%), general insurance (ICICI Lombard 4.2%), and asset managers (Kotak AMC embedded in bank stock). Broadest financial sector proxy — as India financializes (credit-to-GDP rising, insurance penetration ~3% vs 8% global average), this index captures entire structural upgrade. Three investment cycles: (1) Credit growth cycle — when credit expands faster than deposits, NIMs widen, bank profits surge 30%+ YoY; (2) Insurance penetration cycle — as incomes rise, term insurance adoption accelerates from 10% to 30% of working population; (3) Capital markets cycle — when Nifty rises, retail inflows to mutual funds rise, creating AUM growth for asset managers. Correlated to INR strength — RBI holding $600B forex reserves creates credibility, attracting capital inflows that fuel equity markets. Negative correlation to US 10-year yields — when US rates fall, Indian rates fall, pushing financial stocks up.

holdings.name: HDFC Bank
holdings.description: Largest private bank. Post-HDFC merger balance sheet ₹25 trillion. Dominant retail, SME, and corporate banking franchise. Consistent 17-18% ROE over cycles.

holdings.name: ICICI Bank
holdings.description: Transformed retail-first strategy under CEO Bakhshi. NIMs above 4%, best-in-class credit cost. iGrow, merchant solutions, and open banking APIs driving new revenue streams.

holdings.name: Kotak Mahindra Bank
holdings.description: Premium franchise with conservative lending. Kotak Securities, Kotak AMC, Kotak Insurance create a financial services conglomerate under one listed entity.

holdings.name: SBI Life Insurance
holdings.description: India's largest private life insurer by new business premium. SBI's branch network of 22,000+ provides unmatched distribution. ULIPs and term plans drive volumes.

holdings.name: HDFC Life Insurance
holdings.description: Premium private life insurer. Strong annuity, protection, and retirement product mix. PAR savings and non-PAR guaranteed products for risk-averse customers. Consistent VNB margin above 26%.

holdings.name: Bajaj Finance
holdings.description: India's most profitable NBFC. 90M+ customers. Consumer finance, SME lending, rural and commercial lending. Bajaj Pay and EMI Card ecosystem create customer stickiness.

holdings.name: Axis Bank
holdings.description: Post-Citi integration, axis has the largest credit card portfolio among private banks. Premium affluent segment banking growing rapidly.

holdings.name: ICICI Lombard
holdings.description: India's largest private general insurer. Motor, health, and commercial lines. Strong combined ratio management. Data-driven underwriting and claims. Acquired Bharti AXA General Insurance.

holdings.name: ICICI Prudential Life
holdings.description: Joint venture between ICICI Bank and Prudential plc. Strong ULIP franchise with equity savings and pension products. Protection business scale-up underway. APE growth driven by direct and banca channels.

holdings.name: Bajaj Finserv
holdings.description: Holding company for Bajaj Finance, Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance, and Bajaj Allianz General Insurance. Trading at structural conglomerate discount to sum-of-parts. Insurance businesses scaling rapidly.

name: ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund - ICICI Pru Nifty Fin Ser Ex-Bank ETF

index.name: ICICI Prudential Nifty Financial Services Ex-Bank ETF
index.description: ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund - ICICI Pru Nifty Fin Ser Ex-Bank ETF tracks the ICICI Prudential Nifty Financial Services Ex-Bank ETF index.

holdings.name: HDFC Bank
holdings.description: Largest BFSI index constituent. Post-HDFC merger universal bank with India's largest home loan and retail banking franchise. Anchors every financial services index by sheer market cap.

holdings.name: ICICI Bank
holdings.description: 2nd largest. Diversified across retail, SME and corporate banking. Insurance subsidiaries (ICICI Prudential Life, ICICI Lombard General) and ICICI Securities add fee income depth.

holdings.name: Kotak Mahindra Bank
holdings.description: Ultra-high-quality private bank. Kotak Mahindra AMC (3rd largest), Kotak Life Insurance, Kotak Securities — a fully integrated financial services conglomerate under one brand.

holdings.name: State Bank of India
holdings.description: World's 8th largest bank by assets. SBI Cards (credit cards, 200Bn+ receivables), SBI Life ($10B+ AUM) and SBI Mutual Fund subsidiaries create a financial conglomerate. NPA cycle fully resolved.

holdings.name: Bajaj Finance
holdings.description: India's most valuable NBFC. Consumer lending, EMI finance, gold loans, insurance distribution and co-branded credit cards. 85M+ customers, 4,000+ locations. Technology-first approach — B2C app handles 75%+ of disbursals.

holdings.name: Axis Bank
holdings.description: 3rd largest private bank by assets. Citibank India integration adding premium customer base. Axis Max Life (JV) and Axis AMC strengthen wealth management revenue streams.
